entries.sentence: The athlete trains for two hours every morning.
entries.chinese: athlete = 运动员；这名运动员每天早上训练两个小时。

entries.sentence: Athletics includes running, jumping, and throwing events.
entries.chinese: athletics = 田径运动；田径运动包括跑、跳和投掷项目。

entries.sentence: We played baseball in the park after school.
entries.chinese: baseball = 棒球；放学后我们在公园里打棒球。

entries.sentence: Our basketball practice starts at half past four.
entries.chinese: basketball = 篮球；我们的篮球训练四点半开始。

entries.sentence: This old CD player still works well.
entries.chinese: CD player = CD播放机；这台旧光盘播放机仍然很好用。

entries.sentence: The coach showed us a better way to pass the ball.
entries.chinese: coach = 教练；教练向我们示范了更好的传球方法。

entries.sentence: Connect the DVD player to the television.
entries.chinese: DVD player = DVD播放机；把光盘播放机连接到电视上。

entries.sentence: Rock climbing can be a dangerous extreme sport.
entries.chinese: extreme sport = 极限运动；攀岩可能是一项危险的极限运动。

entries.sentence: The football player scored twice in the final.
entries.chinese: football player = 足球运动员；这名足球运动员在决赛中进了两球。

entries.sentence: My grandfather plays golf on Sunday mornings.
entries.chinese: golf = 高尔夫球；我祖父星期天早上打高尔夫球。

entries.sentence: I go to the gym after work on Tuesdays.
entries.chinese: gym = 健身房；我星期二下班后去健身房。

entries.sentence: Gymnastics requires strength and balance.
entries.chinese: gymnastics = 体操；体操需要力量和平衡能力。

entries.sentence: Our school hockey team won the match.
entries.chinese: hockey = 曲棍球；我们学校的曲棍球队赢得了比赛。

entries.sentence: Ice hockey players wear helmets and thick gloves.
entries.chinese: ice hockey = 冰球；冰球运动员戴头盔和厚手套。

entries.sentence: We went ice skating on the frozen lake.
entries.chinese: ice skating = 滑冰；我们去结冰的湖上滑冰了。

entries.sentence: The match ended with a score of two to one.
entries.chinese: match = 比赛；比赛以二比一的比分结束。

entries.sentence: Motor-racing drivers must react very quickly.
entries.chinese: motor-racing = 赛车运动；赛车手必须反应非常迅速。

entries.sentence: Each player shook hands after the game.
entries.chinese: player = 运动员；比赛后每位运动员都握了手。

entries.sentence: We played pool while we waited for the bus.
entries.chinese: pool = 台球；等公交车时我们打了台球。

entries.sentence: Horse racing is popular in this region.
entries.chinese: racing = 赛马；赛马在这个地区很受欢迎。

entries.sentence: Rugby players often pass the ball backwards.
entries.chinese: rugby = 橄榄球；橄榄球运动员经常向后传球。

entries.sentence: Children can skate safely on this indoor rink.
entries.chinese: skate = 滑冰；孩子们可以在这个室内冰场安全地滑冰。

entries.sentence: Skating is easier when the ice is smooth.
entries.chinese: skating = 滑冰运动；冰面平滑时滑冰更容易。

entries.sentence: We learned skiing during our winter holiday.
entries.chinese: skiing = 滑雪；我们寒假期间学习了滑雪。

entries.sentence: Swimming is my favourite sport.
entries.chinese: sport = 运动；游泳是我最喜欢的运动。

entries.sentence: I swim ten lengths before breakfast.
entries.chinese: swim = 游泳；我早餐前游十个来回。

entries.sentence: Her swimming costume was still wet after the lesson.
entries.chinese: swimming costume = 泳衣；课程结束后她的泳衣还是湿的。

entries.sentence: The swimming pool is closed for repairs today.
entries.chinese: swimming pool = 游泳池；游泳池今天因维修而关闭。

entries.sentence: We played table tennis in the youth club.
entries.chinese: table tennis = 乒乓球；我们在青少年俱乐部打了乒乓球。

entries.sentence: Every member of the team arrived on time.
entries.chinese: team = 队伍；队里的每名成员都准时到达。

entries.sentence: The students played volleyball on the beach.
entries.chinese: volleyball = 排球；学生们在海滩上打排球。

entries.sentence: Yoga helps me relax after a busy day.
entries.chinese: yoga = 瑜伽；瑜伽帮助我在忙碌一天后放松。

entries.sentence: Drink a small amount of water during each break.
entries.chinese: amount = 数量；每次休息时喝少量的水。

entries.sentence: Her average score this season is eighty percent.
entries.chinese: average = 平均数；她本赛季的平均得分是百分之八十。

entries.sentence: Count how many laps you can run in ten minutes.
entries.chinese: count = 数数；数一数你十分钟能跑多少圈。

entries.sentence: The temperature fell by one degree during the race.
entries.chinese: degree = 度；比赛期间气温下降了一度。

entries.sentence: The depth of this pool is two metres.
entries.chinese: depth = 深度；这个泳池的深度是两米。

entries.sentence: We ran double the usual distance today.
entries.chinese: double = 两倍的；我们今天跑了平常两倍的距离。

entries.sentence: Half of the team practised indoors.
entries.chinese: half = 一半；队伍中有一半的人在室内训练。

entries.sentence: The height of the basketball hoop is fixed.
entries.chinese: height = 高度；篮球架的高度是固定的。

entries.sentence: The final kilometre of the race was uphill.
entries.chinese: kilometre = 千米；比赛最后一千米是上坡路。

entries.sentence: She won the race by less than a metre.
entries.chinese: metre = 米；她以不到一米的优势赢得了比赛。

entries.sentence: He can run a mile in under seven minutes.
entries.chinese: mile = 英里；他能在七分钟内跑完一英里。

entries.sentence: Write your race number on the form.
entries.chinese: number = 号码；在表格上写下你的比赛号码。

entries.sentence: I need a new pair of running shoes.
entries.chinese: pair = 一双；我需要一双新的跑鞋。

entries.sentence: About sixty percent of the class joined a sports club.
entries.chinese: percent = 百分比；班里大约百分之六十的学生加入了体育俱乐部。

entries.sentence: Our team earned one point for the draw.
entries.chinese: point = 分；我们队因平局获得了一分。

entries.sentence: The first quarter of the game was very close.
entries.chinese: quarter = 一节；比赛第一节双方比分很接近。

entries.sentence: The final score was three to two.
entries.chinese: score = 比分；最终比分是三比二。

entries.sentence: Add the three times to find the total.
entries.chinese: total = 总数；把三次用时相加得出总数。
